title: Check In - Status Transition & Dashboard Visibility

assertions.expected: Tab shows bookings filtered by status CONFIRMED only
assertions.actual: Dashboard loaded; Check In tab active; filtered list shows 3 CONFIRMED bookings

assertions.step: Verify tab filters by status CONFIRMED only
assertions.expected: Check In tab displays only bookings with status=CONFIRMED
assertions.actual: All visible bookings have status CONFIRMED; no CHECKIN or CHECKED_OUT entries in tab

assertions.step: Click Check In button on booking BK_SZ67RSQS
assertions.expected: Button click triggers status change; API call succeeds
assertions.actual: POST /api/v1/booking/checkin returned 200; booking status updated to CHECKIN

assertions.step: Verify booking moves from Check In tab to Checked Out tab
assertions.expected: After check-in, booking no longer shows in Check In tab; appears in Check Out tab
assertions.actual: Dashboard refreshed; BK_SZ67RSQS no longer visible in Check In tab; visible in Check Out tab

assertions.step: Verify calendar bar color changes to CHECKIN shade
assertions.expected: Calendar bar changes from blue (CONFIRMED) to orange (CHECKIN)
assertions.actual: Calendar Week view bar for BK_SZ67RSQS changed from #0066CC (blue) to #FF9900 (orange)

assertions.step: Re-fetch booking API to confirm status=CHECKIN
assertions.actual: API response shows status: CHECKIN; booking locked for editing; checkout date enforced

notes: File coverage: src/components/Dashboard.tsx:156-190. Status workflow CONFIRMED→CHECKIN verified. Tab filtering and calendar color update confirmed.
